mapper.select: select book.id, book.book_name, author.author_name, book.cover_url, book.publish_date, book.create_time from tb_book book join tb_author author on book.author_id = author.id where book.is_delete = 0 order by book.create_time desc limit 3

select book.id, book.book_name, author.author_name, publisher.publisher_name, book.isbn, book.cover_url, book.publish_date from tb_book book join tb_author author on book.author_id = author.id join tb_publisher publisher on book.publisher_id = publisher.id where book.is_delete = 0
and book.book_name like concat('%', #{searchDTO.keyword}, '%') or author.author_name like concat('%', #{searchDTO.keyword}, '%') or publisher.publisher_name like concat('%', #{searchDTO.keyword}, '%') or book.isbn like concat('%', #{searchDTO.keyword}, '%')
order by book.publish_date desc
